goal: Unify card codex and shared catalog output to two active card types only (立论/策术) so users no longer see five-type taxonomy in gameplay-facing card views.
constraints: Follow the latest user-confirmed battle/card taxonomy direction: active card typing must be two types only.
Do not rewrite the full 170-card corpus manually; prefer deterministic normalization at data boundary.
Keep scope limited to card data typing/output and required conflict arbitration record.
Do not modify unrelated story, community, or main-menu systems in this task.
deliverables: Conflict arbitration record documenting replacement of prior five-type codex taxonomy with two-type output.
showcaseCards exports only two active card types for downstream catalog/card showcase consumers.
Type color map and card typing stay consistent with two-type output.
